name: context-pack
description: Repo-local context packs and handoff checkpoints for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Start agents from focused repo context.
interface.longDescription: Context Pack keeps a lightweight repo-local context library, provides a one-command start flow, writes ignored local checkpoints by default, and generates task or review packs so coding agents can begin from relevant files, contracts, tests, and stale warnings instead of rereading the repository.
defaultPrompt: Build a review context pack for my changes.
Checkpoint this work for the next session.
